summary: Iteration 29 - Dual Prediction System (Algo + Claude) testing complete. Backend 6-factor live model and 5-factor pre-match model verified. Frontend displays Combined Prediction Block, 5-factor breakdown on PreMatch, and 6-factor breakdown on LiveMatch. Claude prompts contain 2023-2026 data constraint.

minor.issue: Cached predictions still have old 11-factor structure. New predictions will use 5-factor model.

issues: Cached predictions show old factor weights (Form 12% instead of 35%). New predictions will show correct weights.

passed_tests: Backend: API health check - version 4.1.0, dataSource: Claude Opus + Web Scraping
Backend: GET /api/schedule returns matches list (70 matches)
Backend: 6-factor live model weights correct (Score vs Par 30%, Wickets 25%, Recent Rate 15%, Bowlers 15%, Pre-match 10%, Context 5%)
Backend: 6-factor breakdown returns all factors with values 0-1
Backend: compute_prediction from pre_match_predictor.py returns 5-factor model
Backend: 5-factor pre-match weights correct (Form 35%, Squad 25%, Team Combo 20%, Home 15%, H2H 5%)
Backend: ai_service.py contains '2023 to 2026' data constraint in Claude prompts
Frontend: PreMatch page renders with data-testid='pre-match-page'
Frontend: Combined Prediction Block visible at top with data-testid='combined-prediction-block'
Frontend: Algorithm prediction box shows when algo data exists
Frontend: 'Run both Algorithm and Claude predictions' message shows when no Claude data
Frontend: PreMatchPredictionBreakdown shows 5 factors (Form, Squad Strength, Team Combination, Home Advantage, H2H + Pitch)
Frontend: LiveMatch page displays 6-factor breakdown with correct labels
Frontend: 6-factor labels: Score vs Par (0.30), Wickets in Hand (0.25), Recent Over Rate (0.15), Bowlers Remaining (0.15), Pre-match Base (0.10), Situation Context (0.05)
Frontend: Model consensus indicator shows HIGH/MODERATE/LOW based on model agreement
Frontend: Dual prediction models section visible on LiveMatch page
action_items: Consider running 'Re-Predict All' to regenerate cached predictions with new 5-factor model weights
critical_code_review_comments: live_predictor.py correctly implements 6-factor model with weights summing to 1.0
pre_match_predictor.py correctly implements 5-factor model (Form 35%, Squad 25%, Team Combo 20%, Home 15%, H2H 5%)
ai_service.py contains '2023 to 2026' constraint in multiple Claude prompts (lines 683, 801, 966)
CombinedPredictionBlock.js correctly shows Algorithm + Claude + Average predictions
PreMatchPredictionBreakdown.js displays 5 factors with correct labels
LiveMatch.js displays 6-factor breakdown with correct weights

success_rate.backend: 82% (9/11 tests passed - 2 failed due to cached data using old model)

test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 features verified. The 5-factor pre-match model (Form 35%, Squad 25%, Team Combo 20%, Home 15%, H2H 5%) is implemented in pre_match_predictor.py. The 6-factor live model (Score vs Par 30%, Wickets 25%, Recent Rate 15%, Bowlers 15%, Pre-match 10%, Context 5%) is implemented in live_predictor.py. Cached predictions in DB still have old 11-factor structure - new predictions will use the new models. Claude prompts enforce 2023-2026 data constraint. CSK vs RCB (ipl2026_011) is currently live.
